To learn more about our Q-ID® anti-counterfeit labels, please get in touch.
Our anti-counterfeit labels use Q-ID® technology built from the inherent randomness of quantum materials, making every label unique at an atomic level.
Once a Q-ID® tag is applied, it can be read in seconds using a standard smartphone camera, helping both end users and supply-chain teams confirm product authenticity quickly.
In addition to authentication, Q-ID® tags can support global track-and-trace and provide real-time market data through smartphone interactions.
